ai_summary: Nupur Recyclers Limited announced the resignation of Mr. Kapal Kumar Vohra, an Independent Director, effective June 22, 2026, citing new professional responsibilities requiring intensive devotion. His departure significantly impacts the company's governance structure, as he also ceases to be Chairman of the Audit and Stakeholders Relationship Committees, and a member of the Nomination and Remuneration Committee. While the loss of a key independent director from critical committees warrants attention, the company and Mr. Vohra explicitly confirm no other material reasons beyond the stated professional commitments.
